example: Computer programming language enables computers to understand us.
ja: コンピュータプログラミング言語

example: In the earlier days, computer programs were written in lengthy instructions using binary code.
Grace Hopper was an American computer scientist and United States Navy officer.
zh: 格蕾絲·霍普，著名美國電腦科學家及海軍軍官
ja: グレース・ホッパー、アメリカのコンピュータ科学者で海軍将校

example: Grace always had the knack of working around things.
At the age of seven, she dismantled all the alarm clocks in her house to figure out how they worked.
Upon her arrival from the Navy, she met the Mach 1 computer.
She discovered that the computer was very similar to a library.
She called these locations called Numbers and grouped them on a record.
The computer worked it out by decoding the English words.
They staunchly felt that a mere computer could not understand English.
She presented the first ever computer program, which was known as the A0 compiler.
Grace led the team that invented Cobol, making her the mother of Cobol.
Cobol was very user-friendly and fast.
ja: ユーザーフレンドリーな

example: Grace also invented the terms bug and debug, relating to computer errors.
Grace also invented the terms bug and debug, relating to computer errors.
Taping the moth into her logbook, she wrote, first actual bug found.
